data_availability: PARTIAL — GitHub GraphQL Discussions API not accessible via current MCP tooling; data sourced from issues tagged 'discussion' or 'help wanted', high-comment issues, and new issue signals

issues_labeled_discussion.note: Issues tagged 'discussion' are the closest available proxy for community discussions

notable_discussion_issues.note: Most commented open issue — acts as community FAQ hub

notable_discussion_issues.title: [Feature]: Track Vercel AI SDK v7 features and migration plan for Cherry Studio v2
notable_discussion_issues.author: DeJeune

notable_discussion_issues.title: [Feature]: Make reasoning-effort control data-driven from ProviderRegistry
notable_discussion_issues.author: DeJeune
notable_discussion_issues.status: open — filed yesterday, corroborated today by user issue #16623
notable_discussion_issues.note: Detailed architectural proposal with four failure modes (A: control disabled, B: selection not serialized, C: silent coercion, D: empty descriptor). Community is actively feeling this pain (see #16623). HIGH priority unlabeled.

top_feature_categories_by_volume: UI/UX improvements (32/100 recent open issues, estimated 280+ total)
AI Model compatibility (14/100 recent — thinking mode, reasoning effort, new model support)
high_engagement_areas: Reasoning/thinking effort control — user frustration with new model support (#16623, #16598); MiniMax M3 bugs now resolved (#16619, #16624)
Knowledge base reliability — KB crash on large imports (#16610); vector search migration (PR #16626)
Agent mode reliability — MCP connectivity, SOUL.md validation, stale proxy issues
Database layer stability — libsql → better-sqlite3 migration (PR #16626) removes entire class of SQLITE_BUSY bugs
Cross-device sync — backup race conditions, WebDAV issues (#15316)
UI personalization — notification center (#14899, P1), anchor rail UX (#16620), font/sidebar customization
Selection Assistant compatibility — Foxit PDF clipboard delay (#16627)

new_signals_2026_07_01.title: refactor(db): replace libsql with better-sqlite3 + sqlite-vec
new_signals_2026_07_01.author: 0xfullex
new_signals_2026_07_01.significance: MAJOR ARCHITECTURAL — eliminates SQLITE_BUSY workarounds; synchronous transaction model; win-arm64 sqlite-vec gap remains
new_signals_2026_07_01.community_impact: Fixes underlying cause of write-race issues reported by users; KB vector search now uses sqlite-vec instead of libsql vector32

new_signals_2026_07_01.title: [Bug]: Thinking/Reasoning settings are insufficient
new_signals_2026_07_01.author: oooskarrr
new_signals_2026_07_01.significance: Community validation of #16598 architectural SSoT proposal — user cannot set reasoning for M3, new Sonnet, GLM-5.2; provider-specific options hardcoded rather than registry-driven

new_signals_2026_07_01.title: [Feature]: Group Conversation Anchors by Turn
new_signals_2026_07_01.author: SiinXu
new_signals_2026_07_01.significance: Well-specified UX improvement — anchor rail shows question-per-turn rather than one tick per message; related to long-standing requests #9643, #7238

new_signals_2026_07_01.title: [Bug]: Selection Assistant fails in Foxit PDF Editor
new_signals_2026_07_01.author: Snowbird8
new_signals_2026_07_01.significance: Detailed root-cause analysis: Foxit's 200–500ms clipboard delay exceeds Cherry Studio timeout; suggests configurable clipboard read delay setting

new_signals_2026_07_01.note: CLOSED — both M3 thinking mode bugs resolved today (#16619 and #16624)

action_items: Label + triage #16598 (reasoning SSoT) — urgent given community corroboration from #16623 today
Escalate #16610 (KB crash on large imports) to P1 — unlabeled crash-level bug
Review PR #16626 (better-sqlite3 migration) — major arch change; win-arm64 sqlite-vec gap needs follow-up
Address Selection Assistant clipboard timeout (#16627) — add configurable delay in settings
Close #15409 — security fix already shipped in v1.9.11
Investigate #15267 (analytics opt-out P1) — ongoing community privacy concern
